programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a researcher is kidnapped in a South American country by an old adversary of Jonathans he undertakes to personally deliver the ransom and ensure the safety of the researcher and his pregnant wife

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: With Christine busy looking for a missing child and getting ready for the sergeants exam Mary Beth prepares for her breast surgery

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky risks his badge to nurse back to health and sobriety a former classmate now an alcoholic fashion model who is also the only person who can describe a homicidal burglar which is why that killer is determined to see her dead

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke helps a woman rescue child refugees from a mad scientists unmanned tanks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: On Halloween night Micki and Ryan are visited by the ghost of their late uncle who has returned from the underworld

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lovers quarrel Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car Next Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtors chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car And finally Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Addams Family 133
programme.desc: Addams Family 133

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A friendly country girl has a crush on Kimble and wants to help him escape on the condition she can go with him as the Sheriff and Lt Gerard close in on them

programme.title: Fredy 112
programme.desc: Fredy 112

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A hot-rod racer uses a cursed necklace to win events by killing his competition and dipping the chain in his victims blood

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When it seems that Grandpas location of water by divining rod is a failure Luke employs a geologist and drilling equipment as Amos gloats at the apparent unsuccessful outcome of Lukes chosen methods

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa solicits George MacMichaels help in turning the tables on two swindlers who convinced him to pay 35 for a worthless dog but he begins to have a change of heart when he discovers that Little Luke has become quite attached to the animal

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After every number two man at CONTROL is killed Hymie becomes number two

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS puts up a reward for anyone who can Get Smart!

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends a woman who is suspected of being a witch by the people from the town in which she lives They have to deal with a plot to get rid of her that is hatched by the supersticious locals

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogans success Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht each trying to take over Stalag 13

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Photographer with an attitude is assigned to the 73 Crew McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to get rid of her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Ashamed of his desk job Binghamton assumes command of the 73 during McHales absence and takes it out on a combat mission so that he can have a war story to share with his battle-hardened fellow Officers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper believes that Gilligan has found The Eye of the Idol which gives him three wishes before sundown However the Professor believes it is just a silly superstition and just an ordinary cats eye

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dans love interest Christy Winters is strangled in her hotel room Her friend tries to help him solve the case and becomes the next victim Both girls were with Dan right before their murders leaving Dan badly grief-stricken

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick realizes hes been resting on his laurels as a writer when all of his attempts to get a book published under the pen name Dwight Schmidlapp are met with rejection

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A new waitress at the Minuteman Cafe comes between Larry Darryl and Darryl Meanwhile George protests Michaels decision to cancel the television stations reruns of Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Teague asks Mitch and Ryan for help of the Knights Templar when they are faced with torture devices which are controlled with modern electronics by an Asian woman

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonias recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer but theres a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movies star have a checkered history Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor whos got too many cars and too many girlfriends Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment Daan and Liam try to convince Zoor that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path Maiya makes contact with Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A glimpse into a future devastated by man-made environmental disaster ensures that Senator Parker will take action to prevent it happening - to the best of his ability at least But that may not be enough

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Dr Arcane dies during a mutation experiment gone wrong Graham accuses Stella of attempting to replace him in the lab by seducing Arcane During their fight Graham falls for Stella conceding that Arcane must have seduced her in mind if not body Their tender moment is ruined however when Graham is alerted to a break-in at the lab its Dr Arcane reduced to his inner beast by the failed experiment Can Graham stop him before tragedy strikes

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Several crew members explore the planet Sunin including botanist Shermeen Williams who appears to have visionary gifts She links up with an alien called Vindrus who wants her help in transferring his body and that of his race into solid matter giving them proper human form so that they can join the universe as real matter However for every one of his race made flesh an Alphan must lose their matter

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a replica American town are being used themselves as the unknowing carriers of a deadly plague The IM force must stop this from happening and bring the party responsible forward

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As the powerful Barkley family and surrounding Valley community face the prospect of losing their land to a ruthless railroad baron a mysterious stranger arrives with life-changing news for the family

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves Kiefer Sutherland and Billy Zane star as high-school students who start a vigilante group to combat crime in their neighborhood

programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.desc: Chad Anheliger is well rounded in most fight sports but has been having issues with hip flexibility and a long-term shoulder injury. After some time with Sports Conditioning coach Marie Michalski, he learns valuable skills to make him a stronger fighter.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Derek Daku vs. Allan Bogle; Mike Geib vs. Kevin Taylor; Ethan Cornect vs. Chris Wilson; Craig Gaudry vs. Meelad Hashtee; Christian Olson vs. Nic Grandbois.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.
